name: io.github.jarmstrong158/cambium
title: Cambium
description: Knowledge-lifecycle MCP: distill agentsync + context-keeper events into memory, recall across projects, promote local -> team -> org.

environmentVariables.name: CAMBIUM_REPO
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the project git clone cambium reads/writes. Defaults to the current repo (cwd git root) when unset.

environmentVariables.name: CAMBIUM_AGENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Your unique agent id, attributed to captures/endorsements/promotions.

environmentVariables.name: CAMBIUM_ORG_REPO
environmentVariables.description: Path to the org knowledge repo clone (org scope). Omit to keep promotions at team scope.
